mapper.update: update Writing set image_adder_list=#{adder} where user_id=#{userId} and writing_id=#{writingId} and image_adder_list='[]'
mapper.select: select user_id, username, personal_signature, header_image_adder, sex, birthday, phone_number, follower_amount, liker_amount, writing_amount, like_amount, collect_amount, create_time from User where phone_number=#{phoneNumber} and password=#{password}
